title: What is your drive to continue vegetarian — July 2021 todos
html:
TL;DR

  • 18yo Yahir opens with a self-prompt — "what is your drive to continue vegetarian" — sitting above six action items including therapist outreach, Emilio therapist conversation, Peru booking with DMorr, ALEKS math test (✅), Python course start
  • Confirms the Nov 2020 omnivore pantry → mid-2021 vegetarian transition arc; this is the first explicit "why am I doing this" check-in on it
  • "Get/talk to Emilio about therapist" is the therapy is now a family conversation moment — Yahir making sure his younger brother has access to mental-health resources, age 18 protecting age 15
  • Peru tickets are CHECKMARKED — so the DMorr / Machu Picchu trip is locked in by July 28
  • The Python course recurs again — will appear in the August 3 Ford mentor note still uncompleted

Notes

The header is the substance: "what is your drive to continue vegetarian" — Yahir asking himself, in writing, to defend a choice he made roughly six months earlier (between 2020 11 03 vegetable grocery list and now). This is the earliest documented instance of the publicly question your own commitment discipline that becomes a recurring Yahir move (see 2025 12 02 are you willing to go deeper). At 18 the answer presumably remains "yes" — vegetarian-Yahir persists into the Austin era.

The Emilio-therapist line is the most consequential. Yahir, mid-launch into OSU, is already operating as the family's mental-health broker for his younger brother. This is the same pattern the densified Emilio page documents: Yahir sees himself as the inheritor-protector of family knowledge, and now he's adding mental health to the ledger. It precedes the Christmas Eve 2022 crisis where he'll wish more therapy infrastructure had been in place.

"call option therapist" and "talk to Emilio about therapist" appear in the same line group — Yahir is sourcing therapy for himself AND surfacing it for his brother in the same writing-block. The therapy-as-shared-resource framing fits the broader family translator role.

DMorr confirmed-checked for Peru dates the trip planning; combined with the Aug 3 note's "reserve Machu Picchu tickets", the trip is being booked across late July / early August.

Connections

emilio · david morris · peru prep 2021 · machu picchu · vegetarianism · therapy as family resource · 2020 11 03 vegetable grocery list · 2021 08 03 kira ford mentor intro · grants pass teen era · yahir family
